# Elena Vasquez

## Summary

Backend engineer with six years building payment and ledger services in Go. Comfortable owning services from schema design through on-call. Looking for platform work with strong reliability and compliance requirements.

## Experience

### Senior Backend Engineer · NordLedger AG · 2021–Present

- Led migration of settlement workers from a monolithic Ruby process to **Go** services processing 40k events/minute with Redis-backed queues
- Designed PostgreSQL partitioning strategy that cut p95 reconciliation queries from 800ms to 90ms
- Introduced OpenTelemetry tracing across ingestion, scoring, and webhook dispatch paths
- Mentored two mid-level engineers; ran weekly design reviews focused on idempotency and failure modes

### Backend Engineer · PayStream GmbH · 2019–2021

- Built REST and gRPC APIs in **Go** for merchant onboarding and KYC handoffs
- Implemented retry-safe webhook consumers with dead-letter queues and replay tooling
- Wrote load tests that uncovered connection pool exhaustion before Black Friday traffic
